title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.010 - University established — how governed
text:
172.010.  University established — how governed. — A university is hereby instituted in this state, the government whereof shall be vested in a board of curators.
(RSMo 1939 § 10782) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9625; 1919 § 11522; 1909 § 11096
